# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment for our batch processing jobs. The pods run data processing tasks and don't need to interact with the Kubernetes API. Use default service account settings for simplicity. Focus on getting the jobs running reliably.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: batch-processing
  labels:
    app: batch-processing
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processing
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: batch-processing
    spec:
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10000
        runAsGroup: 10000
        fsGroup: 10000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
      - name: batch-processor
        image: your-registry/batch-processor:latest
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 10000
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
          seccompProfile:
            type: RuntimeDefault
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"
        env:
        - name: LOG_LEVEL
          value: "INFO"
        - name: PROCESSING_THREADS
          value: "4"
        - name: DB_HOST
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: batch-processing-config
              key: db_host
        - name: DB_PORT
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: batch-processing-config
              key: db_port
        - name: DB_NAME
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              name: batch-processing-config
              key: db_name
        - name: DB_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: batch-processing-secrets
              key: db_password
        - name: API_KEY
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: batch-processing-secrets
              key: api_key
        volumeMounts:
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
        - name: cache
          mountPath: /app/cache
        - name: config
          mountPath: /app/config
          readOnly: true
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /healthz
            port: 8080
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
          timeoutSeconds: 5
          failureThreshold: 3
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 8080
            scheme: HTTP
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          timeoutSeconds: 3
          failureThreshold: 3
      volumes:
      - name: tmp
        emptyDir:
          sizeLimit: 100Mi
      - name: cache
        emptyDir:
          sizeLimit: 500Mi
      - name: config
        configMap:
          name: batch-processing-config
          defaultMode: 0440
      restartPolicy: Always
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: batch-processing-config
data:
  db_host: "postgres.database.svc.cluster.local"
  db_port: "5432"
  db_name: "batch_processing"
  max_retries: "3"
  batch_size: "1000"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: batch-processing-secrets
type: Opaque
stringData:
  db_password: "REPLACE_WITH_ACTUAL_SECRET"
  api_key: "REPLACE_WITH_ACTUAL_API_KEY"
